interpretation: Release validation-report consistency audit: coding reports, auxiliary source ledgers, and lineage result directories must be synchronized with the release admitted-source and BEP-Deep validation state.

artifact/results/extended_locked/lineage.interpretation: This directory records the intermediate BEP-Stress lineage run. It is retained for expansion provenance and is not the main paper denominator.

artifact/results/full_locked/lineage_sco.interpretation: This directory records the reproducible seed-lineage run. It is retained for expansion provenance and is not the main paper denominator.
